sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9080" key="a)niso/xronos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐσό-χρονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of unequal duration,</tr_> Herodic. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:4:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4.6</biblScope> </bibl>; in Metric, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">composed of unequal times,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
